typography.hierarchy_rules: H1: text-4xl to text-5xl tracking-tighter font-semibold, H2: text-2xl to text-3xl tracking-tight font-medium, H3: text-xl tracking-tight, Labels/Overlines: uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-xs font-medium

colors.usage: Base the entire app in deep navy/obsidian. Use the cyan and violet exclusively for AI-related actions, data visualization, and primary CTAs. Text is off-white to reduce eye strain.

layout.spacing: Dashboard uses dense 'Control Room' spacing (gap-4, p-4 to p-6). Landing page uses generous spacing (py-24, gap-12).
layout.grid: Use CSS Grid extensively. Dashboard main views typically follow a 12-column subgrid or bento-style layouts (col-span-4 vs col-span-8).
layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05) or border-white/5 to define boundaries instead of heavy shadows.

components.cards: bg-[#1F2937] border border-white/5 rounded-xl. Interaction: hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.2)] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300.
components.inputs: bg-[#111827] border border-white/10 rounded-lg text-[#F1F5F9] placeholder:text-[#94A3B8]. Focus: ring-2 ring-[#06B6D4] ring-offset-1 ring-offset-[#0A0E1A].
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#06B6D4] text-[#0A0E1A] font-semibold hover:bg-[#06B6D4]/90 rounded-md. Ghost: hover:bg-white/5 text-[#F1F5F9].
components.badges: Pill shape (rounded-full), bg-[#0A0E1A] border border-[#06B6D4] text-[#06B6D4] text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 font-medium.
components.glassmorphism: For sticky headers or floating overlays: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0E1A]/70 border-b border-white/10.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Scale and subtle glow on actionable cards.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Skeleton shimmer utilizing absolute pseudo-elements with a subtle cyan/white gradient moving left to right over bg-surface.
motion_and_interactions.charts: Recharts tooltips must have bg-[#1F2937] and border-white/10. Line charts use #06B6D4 and #8B5CF6 with a subtle gradient area fill underneath.

hero_background.description: Abstract neon lines forming a digital landscape. Use as an absolute background with opacity-30 and mix-blend-screen for the landing page hero.

specific_pages.landing: Immersive hero overlaying the neon abstract image. Use a Vercel-like grid (border-collapse) for features, with subtle 1px white/10 borders separating items. High contrast text.
specific_pages.dashboard: Level badge top right, XP bar prominently displayed in the header or top widget. Recent sessions displayed in a dense, list-like format rather than oversized cards.
specific_pages.training_room: CRITICAL: The desktop view must be h-screen with overflow-hidden (no scrolling). Center dominant block is the video feed overlaying the MediaPipe canvas. Right sidebar: Live metrics (gauges, timers). Bottom area overlaid on video: Teleprompter with transparent/glassmorphism background.
specific_pages.report: 8-block AI report bento grid. Executive summary spans full width at the top. The remaining 7 blocks (verbal, rhythm, fillers, visual, structure, historical, next steps) fit into a 3 or 4-column dense grid.
specific_pages.exercise_browser: Category tabs using Shadcn Tabs. Exercise cards use image thumbnails from media list, with difficulty pills on top right.
specific_pages.profile: Simple 2-column layout (Left: Navigation, Right: Forms/Settings). Dark inputs with cyan focus rings.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text on bg-card (#1F2937) passes 4.5:1 ratio using #F1F5F9. Use standard APCA guidelines.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-training-btn', data-testid='exercise-card').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React 18 + TypeScript frontend using Tailwind CSS.
Add 'Outfit' to Google Fonts in index.html for headings, and 'Inter' for the body.
Use Tailwind arbitrary values (e.g., bg-[#0A0E1A]) or configure them directly in tailwind.config.js for consistent usage.
Install and use lucide-react for standard icons.
When using Shadcn UI, strip out light mode variables and replace with the provided hex values for a unified dark theme.
Implement Recharts for all data visualization in the report and progress pages, styling lines/bars with the cyan/violet accent colors.
Ensure the Training Room UI forces 100vh on desktop using h-screen and hidden overflows, utilizing flex or grid to allocate available space dynamically.
